calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-08-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jun-03-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. appeared for plaintiff American Express Bank, FSB, a federal savings bank.
No appearance by defendant Takekuni Haneda, individually and dba Kiku of Tokyo, a/k/a Kiku of Tokyo Rest.
Default was entered against defendant on August 13, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on August 13, 2009.
Order Waiving Witness Appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed May 10, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff American Express Bank, FSB, a federal savings bank, and against the Defaulted Defendant Takekuni Haneda, individually and dba Kiku of Tokyo, a/k/a Kiku of Toko Rest as follows:

Damages/Principal - $60,649.05.
Prejudgment Interest - $5,730.45.
Attorney's Fees - $2,825.00.
Costs - $450.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $69,654.50.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
